kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/ubuntu/dockerFX/reports/browser/traces/f7b45096-c5a7-4b47-99b1-e9fd2a6590b7"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: TC01 - Page de login accessible

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg:
Error: locator.waitFor: Error: strict mode violation: locator('input') resolved to 2 elements: 1) <input value="" required="" type="email" placeholder="votre@email.com"/> aka getByPlaceholder('votre@email.com') 2) <input value="" required="" type="password" placeholder="••••••••••••••••••"/> aka getByPlaceholder('••••••••••••••••••')
Call log: - waiting for locator('input') to be visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.status:
Error: locator.waitFor: Error: strict mode violation: locator('input') resolved to 2 elements: 1) <input value="" required="" type="email" placeholder="votre@email.com"/> aka getByPlaceholder('votre@email.com') 2) <input value="" required="" type="password" placeholder="••••••••••••••••••"/> aka getByPlaceholder('••••••••••••••••••')
Call log: - waiting for locator('input') to be visible

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=input[type="password"] at state visible

Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Network Is Idle
kw.msg: Keyword 'Browser.Wait Until Network Is Idle' is deprecated. Use `Wait For Load State` instead. rfbrowser transform --wait-until-network-is-idle path/to/test command automatically transforms keyword to new format.
Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 15000.0
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED!!* Use `Wait For Load State` instead. rfbrowser transform --wait-until-network-is-idle path/to/test command automatically transforms keyword to new format.
